# truenas_directoryservices (Data Source)

Provides the singleton directory services configuration on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_directoryservices" "current" {}

output "ds_type" {
  value = data.truenas_directoryservices.current.service_type
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `configuration_json` (String) Polymorphic configuration object as a JSON string.
- `credential_json` (String) Polymorphic credential object as a JSON string.
- `enable` (Boolean) Whether directory services are enabled.
- `enable_account_cache` (Boolean) Whether the account cache is enabled.
- `enable_dns_updates` (Boolean) Whether DNS updates are enabled.
- `id` (String) Singleton ID (always 'directoryservices').
- `kerberos_realm` (String) Associated Kerberos realm, if any.
- `service_type` (String) Directory service type (ACTIVEDIRECTORY, IPA, LDAP).
- `timeout` (Number) Timeout in seconds.
